{{Quote|Very sorry is Vurd, indeed and for certain. However, Vurd has made Vurd's decision. Goodbye. You will die now|Kyood Vurd|<ref name="SW17">[[Star Wars (1998) 17|''Star Wars'' (1998) 17]]</ref>}}
'''Kyood Vurd''' was a short [[Ugnaught/Legends|Ugnaught]] businessman who ran a [[Cantina/Legends|cantina]] on the [[Moon/Legends|moon]] of [[Nar Shaddaa/Legends|Nar Shaddaa]] around the time of the [[Invasion of Naboo/Legends|Invasion of Naboo]]. He recently had a scuffle with [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Masters]] [[Mace Windu/Legends|Mace Windu]] and [[Depa Billaba/Legends|Depa Billaba]] when he attempted to kill a [[Aunuanna|street-vendor]] on his turf. The [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]], however, were able to repel Vurd and his gang of thugs.

*[[Star Wars (1998) 17|''Star Wars'' (1998) 17]] {{1st}}
